g.text: NASA Randomized full recheck: strict stride=64, 28/28 RW files

text.style: font-size: 7.5px; font-family: 'Times New Roman', 'DejaVu Serif', 'Times', serif; text-anchor: middle

g.text: RW2/RW3 dominate the full 20-step metric; the result is reported as a dynamic-load stress boundary, not a pass metric.
